guards.name: operation_plan
guards.summary: Apply mode requires a reviewed operation plan.

guards.name: approval_completion
guards.summary: Synthetic fixture does not include completed repo-mutation approval.

guards.name: write_capability
guards.summary: Local adapter must provide filesystem and git write capabilities.

guards.name: dirty_worktree
guards.summary: Git status must be inspected before mutation.

verification.summary: Validate lifecycle files and git status after adapter writes.
